examples: In 2007, Nokia accounted for more than 40% of mobile phone sales worldwide.
Someday some brand will be the Coca-Cola or Nokia or Nike of personal computers with a market share of 40% or so.
Mobile phone champion Nokia, one of Europe's biggest technology success stories, was no exception, losing its market share in just a few years.
Microsoft is an oft-mentioned suitor for Nokia, but the two already have a tight licensing relationship.
The Nokia Lumia 720 delivers a high end camera performance at a mid-range price point.
